context.label: Seed Funding & Investment
context.description: The ability to identify, structure, and secure early-stage capital from investors — including angel rounds, pre-seed, and seed rounds. Addresses the capital gap that prevents Missions from moving from intent to execution. Requires clear pitch, credible traction signal, and investor trust.

evidence.note: Candidate definition. Defined as a required capability for gap_capital_seed_001. Not yet mapped to real providers or validated against closed funding rounds.

context.label: Supply Chain Sourcing
context.description: The ability to identify, evaluate, and contract reliable production and logistics partners. Converts capital and domain knowledge into executable supply chains. Addresses the operational gap that blocks Missions from moving from product design to physical delivery.

evidence.note: Candidate definition. Defined as a required capability for gap_supply_chain_001. Not yet mapped to real providers.

context.label: Community Growth Operations
context.description: The ability to build, activate, and retain an audience around a Mission — from early adopters to a loyal community. Converts trust and shared identity into measurable growth. Addresses the launch gap that prevents Missions from establishing a market presence before they have distribution.

evidence.note: Candidate definition. Defined as a required capability for gap_community_launch_001. Not yet mapped to real providers.

context.label: Brand & Creative Direction
context.description: The ability to define a brand's visual identity, voice, and positioning — and to produce creative output that expresses it consistently. Converts creative vision and domain knowledge into a recognizable market signal. Addresses the brand gap that prevents Missions from differentiating in commodity markets.

evidence.note: Candidate definition. Defined as a required capability for gap_brand_creative_001. Not yet mapped to real providers.

context.label: Couples Therapist Matching
context.description: Matching couples with qualified therapists specialising in relationship and communication issues.

context.label: Affordable Therapy Access
context.description: Reducing financial barriers to ongoing therapy through sliding-scale fees, subsidies, or insurance navigation.

context.label: Scholarship Search & Matching
context.description: Discovering relevant scholarships and grants for a student's specific profile, field, and circumstances.

context.label: Scholarship Application Coaching
context.description: Improving application quality through essay guidance, review, and strategy coaching.

context.label: Business Credit Assessment & Building
context.description: Evaluating business creditworthiness, identifying gaps, and building a credit profile that qualifies for loans.

context.label: Small Business Grant Search
context.description: Identifying government, foundation, and corporate grant programs available to small businesses.

context.label: Traffic Safety Data Analysis
context.description: Analysing accident patterns, high-risk corridors, and contributing factors using sensor, GPS, and incident data.

context.label: Urban Safety Intervention Design
context.description: Designing physical and behavioural interventions — road geometry, signage, speed measures — to reduce accident frequency.

context.label: Volunteer Recruitment Platform
context.description: Attracting and onboarding committed volunteers matched to an NGO's specific roles and schedule.

context.label: Volunteer Coordination & Retention
context.description: Managing volunteer schedules, communication, and engagement to improve long-term retention.
